hooks.command: if [ -f docs/index.html ]; then gh api repos/data-desk-eco/.github/tarball/main 2>/dev/null | tar -xz --strip-components=1 --wildcards '*/.claude' '*/template.html' 2>/dev/null || echo 'warning: failed to refresh skills + template from data-desk-eco/.github (check network / gh auth status)' >&2; fi
